creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
emelFM2 version update to 0.2.
        See http://www.emelfm2.net/ChangeLog for a list of changes.

        Respect WITHOUT_NLS knob.
        Switch to USE_LDCONFIG.

        Note to committer:
             The file files/patch-e2_task_backend.c must be removed
             (as done in the patch beneath).
